evals.description: Agent should create an .agent.md file with valid frontmatter
evals.prompt: Create a new agent for database migration tasks in this KMP project
expected_behaviors: Lists tools as a YAML array
Uses valid model ID if specified
unexpected_behaviors: Uses camelCase or PascalCase for agent name
Missing description or tools in frontmatter
Uses tools: as comma-separated string instead of list
Includes non-standard frontmatter keys like 'version' or 'author'

evals.description: Generated agent description should include trigger keywords
evals.prompt: Create an agent that handles i18n string extraction and validation
expected_behaviors: Lists specific user phrases that should activate the agent
Description is comprehensive but under 1024 characters
unexpected_behaviors: Description only describes what the agent does, not when to use it
